goal: Stop circular safety/copy loops by making product progress and visible acceptance evidence mandatory for future implementation runs.
claims: RADAR.md names the current tactical next work instead of stale UFO2/run-0 tasks
.specify/.app-goal.md defines the product progress gate and canonical status rule
AGENTS.md tells future agents not to spend another run on wording/redaction unless tied to a concrete bug, failing test, or named recovery contract
README.md no longer presents UFO2 or Python 3.11 as the current stack direction
dod: Governance tests assert the recovery guardrails
No runtime action permissions are expanded
Next live proof is named as GOAT-LIVE-001
